slots: Shakti Peetha, temple architecture, spiritual heritage
Begin your journey at one of Maharashtra's most revered temples. Admire the intricate stone carvings and experience the spiritual atmosphere that has drawn devotees for centuries.
Royal palace complex, Maratha history, heritage architecture
Explore the historic court of the Kolhapur rulers and discover the city's deep connection to the Maratha legacy.
Lakeside promenade, sunset views, local recreation
Enjoy a peaceful walk along the waterfront as the sun sets over one of Kolhapur's most beloved landmarks.
Royal artifacts, vintage collections, palace architecture
Step into the residence of the Kolhapur royal family and explore fascinating exhibits showcasing weapons, photographs, and memorabilia from a bygone era.
Discover artifacts that tell the story of the region's rich history, from ancient dynasties to the Maratha period.
Tambda Rassa, Pandhra Rassa, local flavours
Experience Kolhapur's legendary cuisine and discover why the city is celebrated as one of Maharashtra's culinary capitals.
Maratha stronghold, historic battlements, panoramic views
Explore one of Maharashtra's most significant hill forts, closely associated with Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj and the history of the Maratha Empire.
Hilltop shrine, pilgrimage destination, scenic landscapes
Visit this revered temple set amidst rolling hills, offering both spiritual significance and stunning views of the surrounding countryside.
Waterfront heritage architecture, lakeside setting, photography
Conclude your journey by admiring the grandeur of this royal-era palace, beautifully positioned along the shores of Rankala Lake.
